query:
-- =============================================
-- 3. ITENS DOS PEDIDOS (pickingOrderItems)
-- =============================================
INSERT INTO pickingOrderItems (pickingOrderId, productId, requestedQuantity, requestedUM, pickedQuantity, pickedUM, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
-- PED-SCM-001 (990001) - 4 itens
(990001, 930001, 10, 'unit', 10, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
(990001, 930006, 20, 'unit', 20, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
(990001, 930011, 50, 'unit', 50, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
(990001, 930014, 40, 'unit', 40, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
-- PED-SCM-002 (990002) - 3 itens
(990002, 930004, 15, 'unit', 15, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
(990002, 930005, 15, 'unit', 15, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
(990002, 930009, 50, 'unit', 50, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
-- PED-SCM-003 (990003) - 2 itens
(990003, 930013, 25, 'unit', 25, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, NOW()),
(990003, 930015, 25, 'unit', 25, 'unit', 'picked', NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, NOW()),
-- PED-SCM-004 (990004) - 5 itens
(990004, 930002, 30, 'unit', 30, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
(990004, 930003, 50, 'unit', 50, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
(990004, 930007, 20, 'unit', 20, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
(990004, 930008, 50, 'unit', 50, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
(990004, 930012, 50, 'unit', 50, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
-- PED-SCM-005 (990005) - 3 itens
(990005, 930010, 20, 'unit', 20, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
(990005, 930011, 20, 'unit', 20, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW()),
(990005, 930014, 20, 'unit', 20, 'unit', 'picked', NOW(), NOW());

-- =============================================
-- 4. LOGS DE MOVIMENTAÇÃO (deliveryLogs)
-- =============================================
-- PED-SCM-001 (990001): fluxo completo → ARRIVED_COMPLEX > DEPARTED_TO_UNIT > ARRIVED_UNIT > RECEIVING_STARTED > RECEIVE_COMPLETE
INSERT INTO deliveryLogs (tenantId, orderId, deliveryPointId, status, timestamp, userId, notes, createdAt) VALUES
(120001, 990001, 90001, 'ARRIVED_COMPLEX',    NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 8 HOUR,  30001, 'Carga recebida na doca central', NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 8 HOUR),
(120001, 990001, 90001, 'DEPARTED_TO_UNIT',   NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 9 HOUR,  30001, 'Saiu para Farmácia Central de Anestesia', NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 9 HOUR),
(120001, 990001, 90002, 'ARRIVED_UNIT',       NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 10 HOUR, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 10 HOUR),
(120001, 990001, 90002, 'RECEIVING_STARTED',  NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 10 HOUR + INTERVAL 30 MINUTE, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 10 HOUR + INTERVAL 30 MINUTE),
(120001, 990001, 90002, 'RECEIVE_COMPLETE',   NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 11 HOUR, 30001, 'Conferência concluída sem divergências', NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 11 HOUR),

-- PED-SCM-002 (990002): ARRIVED_COMPLEX > DEPARTED_TO_UNIT
(120001, 990002, 90001, 'ARRIVED_COMPLEX',    NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY + INTERVAL 7 HOUR,  30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY + INTERVAL 7 HOUR),
(120001, 990002, 90001, 'DEPARTED_TO_UNIT',   NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY + INTERVAL 8 HOUR,  30001, 'Saiu para UTI', NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY + INTERVAL 8 HOUR),

-- PED-SCM-003 (990003): ARRIVED_COMPLEX apenas
(120001, 990003, 90001, 'ARRIVED_COMPLEX',    NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR, 30001, 'Aguardando transporte interno', NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR),

-- PED-SCM-004 (990004): ARRIVED_COMPLEX > ARRIVED_UNIT > RECEIVING_STARTED
(120001, 990004, 90001, 'ARRIVED_COMPLEX',    NOW() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR),
(120001, 990004, 90001, 'DEPARTED_TO_UNIT',   NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR),
(120001, 990004, 30001, 'ARRIVED_UNIT',       NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR),
(120001, 990004, 30001, 'RECEIVING_STARTED',  NOW() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE, 30001, 'Iniciando conferência', NOW() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);

-- PED-SCM-001 (990001): fluxo completo → ARRIVED_COMPLEX > DEPARTED_TO_UNIT > ARRIVED_UNIT > RECEIVING_STARTED > RECEIVE_COMPLETE
INSERT INTO deliveryLogs (tenantId, orderId, deliveryPointId, status, timestamp, userId, notes, createdAt) VALUES
(120001, 990001, 90001, 'ARRIVED_COMPLEX',    NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 8 HOUR,  30001, 'Carga recebida na doca central', NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY + INTERVAL 8 HOUR),

(120001, 990004, 90001, 'DEPARTED_TO_UNIT',   NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR),
(120001, 990004, 30001, 'ARRIVED_UNIT',       NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR, 30001, NULL, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR),
